SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson, ST_Centroid(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS centroid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
